title: The Jellyfish That Can Reverse Aging
description: Explain transdifferentiation / life-cycle reversal in Turritopsis dohrnii (immortal jellyfish). Note it is not invincible: predation and disease still kill individuals. Ground in marine biology literature on life-cycle reversal. Avoid claiming human immortality applications.
cta: Curious about more bizarre science? Like and follow for more!
